development_roadmap.mvp_launch_boundary: Workspace auth, supplier setup, file/manual import, asset library, pricing and margin preview, bundle/recipe builder, quote generation, status center, and shared UX/design system foundations.

workstreams.name: Platform Foundation
workstreams.focus: Workspace, RBAC, database, object storage, queue, audit, and route shell.

workstreams.name: Supplier And Asset Intake
workstreams.focus: Supplier records, import batches, field mapping, import review, and asset library.

workstreams.name: Commercial Logic
workstreams.focus: Cost components, pricing rules, margin policies, bundles, recipes, and price snapshots.

workstreams.name: Customer Output
workstreams.focus: Customers, quotes, quote lines, approvals, generated output jobs, and share links.

workstreams.name: Frontend Experience
workstreams.focus: Workspace shell, shared components, UI blueprints, design system, responsive behavior, and accessibility.

workstreams.name: Validation And Release
workstreams.focus: Automated tests, accessibility checks, security checks, regression flow, release gates, and operational readiness.

milestones.name: Foundation Ready
readiness_criteria: Workspace auth and RBAC exist
Database, object storage, and queue scaffolds exist
Workspace shell and design tokens are implemented
Authorization tests cover workspace isolation

milestones.name: Supplier Intake Ready
readiness_criteria: Supplier CRUD works
Import wizard supports upload, mapping, validation, and commit
Asset library shows committed products/services
Import error recovery is testable

milestones.name: Commercial Workflow Ready
readiness_criteria: Cost and pricing previews work
Margin alerts and approval states work
Bundles and recipes aggregate component cost
Invalid components block publish

milestones.name: Quote MVP Ready
readiness_criteria: Quotes use customers and price snapshots
Quote generation job produces output metadata
Share links are expiring and revocable
Status center shows async failures

milestones.name: Release Candidate
readiness_criteria: Launch-critical E2E flow passes
Accessibility checks pass for import, tables, builders, and quotes
Security checks pass for RBAC and sharing
Release checklist is complete

roadmap_risks.risk: The MVP has several dependent workflows and could exceed a single release if every screen is built to full depth.
roadmap_risks.mitigation: Build vertical slices with clear milestone gates and keep noncritical variants deferred.

execution_decisions.decision: Build by dependency-aware vertical slices after foundation.

stage_6_handoff_notes: Stage 6 should start with foundation tickets and validate workspace isolation before feature workflows.
